column1: # Question: What are the details of Check24's inbound products from Germany?

# SQL: SELECT p.rate_code, p.rate_type, s.name as supplier, p.source_country, p.destination_country FROM product p JOIN supplier s ON s.id = p.supplier_id WHERE p.client_name = 'Check24' AND p.product_type = 'inbound' AND p.source_country = 'DE' AND p.status = 'active'
